error_signature: There was a problem loading the parameter options from server: '[object Object]'
title: Notion Update DB parameter loading issue
symptom: When attempting to load parameters for the Notion Update DB node, an error message appears stating there was a problem loading the parameter options from the server.
root_cause: The error occurs because the user is providing a Database URL instead of the correct Database Page URL or ID. This leads to n8n being unable to access the specified database, resulting in a loading error.
fix_steps: Open the Notion Update DB node settings
Switch from 'By URL' to 'Database Page → By ID'
Paste only the database ID into the field
Save the workflow and try again
agent_instruction: Change the database reference from URL to ID in the Notion Update DB node settings.
